title: Cobblenormals - Cobblemon + Abnormals Compatibility
description: A datapack that adds Cobblemon compatibility to the Abnormals suite of mods. Includes spawn additions, drop changes, and block/biome tagging.
body:
A simple datapack that adds compatibility between Cobblemon 1.7 and Team Abnormals's mods! This pack adds a variety of flavorful spawns to their biomes, as well as a number of new drops from said mods. Additionally, it also gives proper cobblemon-related tags to biomes, blocks, and more!

In future versions, I'd like to add structures for Abnormals biomes that have special Pokemon spawns, and maybe some loot as well. Additionally, I'd like to expand compatibility with Cobblemon's cooking and fishing mechanics. And of course, I'll support any other major Abnormals mods that release!

**Additional Notes**:
- This pack may conflict with other datapacks that change spawns and item drops. If this is the case, you can download the tags only version to ensure minimum conflict.
- Due to the way ```species_additions``` works, only naturally-spawned regional variants will have their drops updated. For example, killing a Galarian Farfetch'd spawned in with /spawnpokemon will have it drop chicken, but naturally spawned ones should drop duck instead.
